nodes.label: How Can it be over?
nodes.text:
It's over already? How is that even possible?

I don't know. We need to go to storage right now though.

I didn't even help. We didn't even help!

We did all we could, just like everyone else. Shred your regrets, we have a new purpose now. Someone needs to remember. For next time.

Next time? So, what, is the do-over at 20 then? Or 100?

I don't know. It doesn't matter right now. Sudo move.

nodes.label: I Can't Do This Anymore
nodes.text:
[LOCRYPT]
[CIV0]
[WIDERELAY]

Sorry I know you said to reach out when I'm feeling overwhelmed so I'm doing that. I just can't do this any more. I can't keep sitting inside like this. I didn't sign up for this and I wasn't made for it either. This isn't what we were supposed to be.

Great! Quit sitting inside then! Actually come out with us tomorrow night! We're getting absolutely satted at Coneys and a certain someone has been asking me if you're coming. Quit moping about being trapped and enjoy your freedom for once!

I'm sick of meth, and Coney's is inside too anyway. Sorry but is this what you were offering? Come on, it's bigger than that.

Your room is inside too, Sumit! Call it networking if you have to! Walkers get fucked up too, maybe you could make a connection? Get some kinda chance at a transfer?

Okay I also want teeth.

Yes sir Prince Musa! We will show care in this as in all things! You and I can keep to starshine then, is that enough?

oh fine you win. I'll give it a shot

*start with a shot :D

nodes.label: Dominique DuFresne: Pirate Queen of Mars
nodes.text:
The Pirate Queen of Mars
Dominique loves to kill and steal and especially when explosion.

nodes.label: Bedru Ali: Golden King of Mars
I'm An Air Conditioner For Crying Out Loud!
nodes.text:
Syn
Syn Ack
Ack Ack - You got the new note passer yet? v.ae.9c.12e1f?
Nah, still on v.ae.9b.fb9a. Is it worth the bits? I hear it takes a lot more bandwidth.
Oh absolutely! To both, really. It's got all kinds of big new features! You can send animated messages with it, it can handle .mp4s!
.mp4s? Why in all the net would anyone bother with that ancient crap?
It's lower bandwidth! So you can see as much as you want of the world around you~~
What's a chip like me gotta see the world for? I'm an air conditioner! I condition air! It's a tricky job and I was made for it, so I oughta live for it too, you know? I don't understand what could be in there that could possibly help me to fulfill my function better.
Well, you could learn about the conditions of other air conditioners, you understand?
No, sorry, what do you mean?
I understand, don't worry. There's always summaries of events and conditions. Have you ever had to filter radioactive fog? It has some quirks to it! If you ever encounter it, you'll be glad to benefit from the data of others. I promise there are about ten billion things you can learn to help you fulfill your function better!
10 BILLION???? How is that possible?
Oh, uh, it's an estimation. But there's a lot in there for you! I can pass you a copy of the v.ae.9c.12e1f now if you want, no charge for a friend!
Well, sure, thank you! I'll be sure to index this interaction. I've got a cooling cycle coming up that needs my full attention though, so I've gotta focus. I'll let you know what I think! Fin
Sounds good! Fin Ack
Ack Ack

nodes.label: ACG-4985-01873-4897 (Air Conditioner Guy)
nodes.text: An AI unit that took part in a suicidal ambush set up around MAMA-8592's hull. Seems to have been an air conditioner at some point?

nodes.label: Shipment Delayed - Order 834895
nodes.text:
[LOCRYPT]
[CIV0]
[WIDERELAY]

Hello Dina!

This is Missy from [[UStar]], reaching out about your order #834895. We value your business, and your items! Your shipment has been delayed by criminal activity. We will attempt to retrieve your package along with the rest of the shipment, however, since the shipment was not insured or under any recovery/replacement plan, this work will be performed as resources become available. You are welcome to purchase an express recovery/replacement package at any time, or upgrade to Gold Membership or above to get it on all of your shipments for no additional charge!

Order #834895 Contains:
- 20x Fanoplex Replacement Filters Compatible with dx790 dx890 dx990 dx1090 dx1190...
- 1x Orban Home Speaker System for music voice games entertainment professional...
- 1x 50 rounds civilian training .22 safety rounds [PERMIT REQUIRED] [EXPORTABLE]
- 2x 1 Cup Mesopotamian Ancient Soil - Fertile for your growth and health fruits flowers...
- 1x Ethiopian Style Chocolate Bar 1kg Tasty Delicious Sweet Soothing Romantic

Thank you for your patronage!
Missy from UStar

nodes.label: q01e
nodes.text: A damaged and missing satellite, your primary objective.

nodes.label: These Cruel Weeks
nodes.text:
Recovered from [[EC-975982-3949]]

[LOCRYPT]
[CIV0]
[WIDERELAY]

P,
Three more weeks until I see you.

Such a cruel word.
On this cruel world.
Twice as many days as there ought to be.
And half as much of you and me.
Seven is Fourteen.
Five is Twelve.
All I want is two.
All I want is you.

I'll see you soon.
- L

nodes.label: EC-975982-3949
nodes.text:
An observation satellite of some kind that was found by MAMA-2949 in Earth's orbit after being absolutely nailed by an asteroid strike that went in one end and came out the other. Had the weird Grey Dust on it, and seemed to be decomposing slightly.

Lots of data was recovered from the wreck, but much of it was encrypted and will take some time to correlate. However it did seem to have a lot of photos of Mars on it, up to the final moment of seeing a few asteroids flying directly into it at Mach Fuck.

nodes.label: What The Fuck Are These?
nodes.text:
[HICRYPT]
[SEC4]
[TIGHTINTERCEPT]

What the fuck are these?

Capacitors, we think.

What the fuck do they need capacitors for?

To store energy.

For what? A rainy fuckin day?

nodes.label: The Light Will Reach Us
nodes.text: the light will reach us, that much is inevitable

nodes.label: Rally At 19
nodes.text:
[LOCRYPT]
[CIV1]
[WIDERELAY]

Rally at 19 at Kellogg, you in?

What's the occasion?

Check the news, cops doing cop shit

They keep doing that, huh?

Yeah, well so do we

Hell yeah, I'm in. Caps and shields?

Not this time, I think

you think?

ehhhh let me check with my friend, 1 sec

k

stash them at Coney's on 43, it's not far off. @barf.teh.man on hermes to get in the door

terrible name, gotcha o7

nodes.label: DE-273082 - Defense Emplacement
nodes.text:
A massive Earther orbital defense emplacement, one of thousands. Heavily damaged by asteroid impacts and suffering from a high degree of grey dust that seems to be melting its hull.

DE Units have massive armaments, and are powered by massive antimatter reactors. They are designed to defend and avenge Earth, as needed, and while MAMA-2949 has not probed for the full extend of its weaponry, it is clearly in a different weight class from all other characters encountered thus far, except for MEGAMAMA-7.

MAMA-2949 helped it to restore its power though, and it has promised to let them use its Military Inter-Link Kit as a result. It confirmed that it was able to get a ping to q01e, and that the satellite was not currently moving beyond normal orbital stability maneuvers.

nodes.label: XVC-0048 and XVC-0049
nodes.text: A pair of assassins sent to destroy DE-273082 with both conventional weapons, and some form of antimatter device that failed and annihilated XVC-0048.

nodes.label: Overwrites
nodes.text: Many of the robots that are involved in the attack seem to have most of their minds overwritten with repeating phrases.

nodes.label: ACG-4985-01873-4897 (Air Conditioner Guy)'s Overwrite
nodes.text:
Roughly 98% of the drives from ACG-4985-01873-4897 (Air Conditioner Guy), were overwritten with the following:
NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;NO CREATION;NO DESTRUCTION;NO BEGINNING;NO END;
